docstring: EDITABLE SURFACE — the ONLY file a self-evolve fixer may touch. Each knob is a named, bounded numeric constant that already lives in the generated harness engine (src/builder/assemble/harness-templates.ts). A fixer proposes a new `value` within [min,max]; nothing else in the repo is in-bounds. Changes are accepted only via the acceptance harness (full task suite, per-task, no regression + >=1 strict improvement) and never auto-merged. Adding/removing knobs, or touching any other file, is out of bounds by construction.

memory.recallLimit.effect: How many semantic facts + episodic events long-term recall returns. Too low drops facts needed across a long session (info loss); too high floods the context.

loop.maxIterations.effect: Hard cap on tool-loop turns before the run is stopped. Too low truncates multi-step tasks; too high burns budget on stuck runs.

context.keepRecent.effect: Messages kept verbatim (un-summarized) at the tail during context compaction. Too low summarizes away recent detail; too high defeats compaction.

tools.maxTools.effect: Cap on tools exposed to a small model. Too low hides the tool the task needs (forces guessing); too high overwhelms weak dispatch.
